name: unified-harness-resource-manifest
description: Read-only category manifest for OMP, Codex, and Claude harness resources. This file records resource surfaces and migration intent without copying runtime state.

resources.discoverySource: Installed OMP package resource discovery via package-manager and runtime import lookup; command sources are referenced, not copied, in issue #38.
resources.migrationNotes: Issue #39 snapshots portable bundled agents and indexes built-in command, prompt, and rule sources. Runtime-only commands remain reference-only and are not made portable.

resources.discoverySource: Repo-tracked OMP config under adapters/omp/source plus live OMP workflow-kit category under ~/.omp/agent/workflow-kit/.
resources.migrationNotes: Track declarative config and workflow-kit guidance only. adapters/omp/source/config.yml is the operator's full declarative config (ADR 0001 2026-07-02 addendum: the config.local.yml overlay is retired). Secrets, credentials, account IDs, and private environment values stay out of tracked files. Do not read, copy, or normalize private runtime artifacts when comparing live and repo resources.

resources.resourceCategory: personal local config overlay (retired; defensive guard)
resources.discoverySource: Gitignored local OMP config overlays matched by *.local.yml; the overlay contract is retired (ADR 0001 2026-07-02 addendum) but the pattern stays local-only as a defensive guard.
resources.migrationNotes: Retired overlay lane kept as a guard: any *.local.yml is local-only, never tracked, never read or copied by renderers.

resources.resourceCategory: runtime sessions, database files, blobs, terminal state, cache, logs, and private history
resources.discoverySource: Directory and filename patterns only; no runtime files are read or copied.
resources.migrationNotes: Runtime state stays local. Future dry runs may report presence by path pattern, but never copy session, database, blob, terminal, cache, log, or history contents.

resources.discoverySource: Codex home config paths by convention; record key categories only.
resources.migrationNotes: Reference profile and instruction categories without copying provider credentials, local overrides, or private model history.

resources.discoverySource: Codex and shared skill roots by directory name; individual skill deduplication is deferred.
resources.intendedRepoTarget: nucleus/skills/ roster, nucleus/utilities/ kit utilities, .agents/skills/ rendered compatibility surface, docs/harness/codex-adapter-plan.md, and docs/skills/operator-local-manifest.md
resources.migrationNotes: LOO-152 slimmed repo-owned skills to eleven: seven roster agents plus four kit utilities. Seventeen cited-engine utilities moved operator-local to ~/.agents/skills/ (manifest only; no live write). Keep .agents/skills as the rendered compatibility surface; do not vendor plugin-provided skills or global caches as part of this manifest.

resources.resourceCategory: runtime sessions, database files, blobs, auth/cache data, plugin cache, and private history
resources.discoverySource: Codex runtime path patterns only; no file contents are read or copied.
resources.migrationNotes: Keep sessions, local databases, auth material, plugin cache, generated blobs, and private history outside the repo.

resources.discoverySource: Claude home resource categories by directory name; settings are referenced by category only.
resources.migrationNotes: Issue #42 documents dry-run instruction, settings, agent, skill, and per-skill symlink candidates. Adapt reusable agents and skills deliberately. Settings may contain local machine policy, so the plan documents categories and redactions without copying live values.

resources.resourceCategory: runtime sessions, terminal state, auth/cache data, plugin cache, local settings, and private history
resources.discoverySource: Claude runtime path patterns only; no transcript, project, terminal, auth, plugin, or local settings contents are read or copied.
resources.migrationNotes: Private project/session history, shell state, local task/job state, local overrides, daemon state, plugin downloads/data, caches, backups, logs, and cache/auth surfaces are local-only.

resources.discoverySource: Known overlapping global, harness-specific, canonical repo, and rendered compatibility skill roots; this issue records categories only.
resources.migrationNotes: Do not deduplicate in issue #38. Future audit should compare names, triggers, and ownership without copying package/plugin caches. LOO-152 moved seventeen cited-engine utilities out of repo:nucleus/utilities/ to operator-local ~/.agents/skills/ per docs/skills/operator-local-manifest.md.

resources.resourceCategory: personal plugin marketplace catalog and co-located plugin source
resources.discoverySource: Codex-native personal marketplace root (~/.agents/plugins/) per plugin-bridge design sections 1.1/2.1; render-plugin-bridge writes the catalog and the co-located loom-nucleus plugin source here create-missing-only via the strict-manual render -> gate -> apply executor.
resources.intendedRepoTarget: adapters/plugin-bridge/ (authored templates) and distributions/loom-nucleus/ (rendered committed output)
resources.migrationNotes: Personal cross-harness marketplace catalog plus loom-nucleus plugin source (dual .codex-plugin/ + .claude-plugin/ manifests over a shared skills/hooks root with canonical shared-agent packages derived from nucleus/skills/{agent-name}/ at render time). Written only through the gated, marker-tracked, create-missing-only executor. The plugin cache subtrees (~/.codex/plugins/cache/, ~/.claude/plugins/cache/, ~/.claude/plugins/data/) stay local-only and are never write targets.

resources.discoverySource: Claude repo marketplace catalog (.claude-plugin/marketplace.json), also read by Codex as a legacy-compatible repo marketplace; tracked in-repo source rather than a HOME write.
resources.migrationNotes: Repo-scoped catalog listing the loom-nucleus entry with a relative source path. Rendered, gated, and reported by render-plugin-bridge; project-scoped, so it is never written to a live HOME path.

resources.discoverySource: LOO-152 migration manifest at docs/skills/operator-local-manifest.md; seventeen cited-engine utilities removed from repo:nucleus/utilities/.
resources.migrationNotes: LOO-152 removed seventeen cited-engine utilities from repo:nucleus/utilities/. Live skill content stays operator-local under ~/.agents/skills/; the repo records names and paths in the manifest only.
